name: Phase 3 NIXL Plugin Replacement - Request/Response Protocol
description: Replace pip-installed NIXL plugin with custom-built Request/Response protocol plugin for EFA two-sided messaging support

tasks.name: Verify Custom Plugin Exists
tasks.description: Verify that the custom-built Request/Response protocol plugin exists
commands: echo '[ERROR] Custom plugin not found at {{CUSTOM_PLUGIN}}'
echo '[ERROR] Build NIXL with Request/Response protocol first'

tasks.name: Verify Request/Response Code in Custom Plugin
tasks.description: Verify that the custom plugin contains Request/Response protocol code (READ_REQUEST, READ_RESPONSE)
commands: echo '[INFO] Verifying Request/Response code in custom plugin...'

strings {{CUSTOM_PLUGIN}} | grep -q 'READ_REQUEST' && echo '[OK] Custom plugin contains Request/Response code' || { echo '[ERROR] Custom plugin does not contain READ_REQUEST symbol'; echo '[ERROR] This plugin may not be built with Request/Response protocol'; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Backup Original pip Plugin
tasks.description: Create backup of original pip-installed plugin (only if not already backed up)
commands: echo '[INFO] Creating backup of original pip plugin...'

tasks.name: Replace with Custom Plugin
tasks.description: Replace pip plugin with custom-built Request/Response protocol plugin
commands: echo '[INFO] Replacing pip plugin with custom-built plugin...'

tasks.name: Verify Plugin Replacement
tasks.description: Verify that the replaced plugin contains Request/Response code
commands: strings {{TARGET_PLUGIN}} | grep -q 'READ_REQUEST' && { echo '[OK] Replaced plugin contains Request/Response code'; strings {{TARGET_PLUGIN}} | grep -E '(READ_REQUEST|READ_RESPONSE|WRITE_REQUEST|WRITE_RESPONSE)' | head -4; } || { echo '[ERROR] Replaced plugin verification failed'; echo '[ERROR] Restoring original plugin...'; cp {{BACKUP_PLUGIN}} {{TARGET_PLUGIN}}; exit 1; }

tasks.name: Display Plugin Information
tasks.description: Display plugin path and size information for verification
commands: ls -lh {{BACKUP_PLUGIN}} 2>/dev/null | awk '{print "    Size: "$5", Modified: "$6" "$7" "$8}' || echo '    [Not found]'
